steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0007_ibm_granite_4_1_benchmark branch from main and plan all task steps.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0001_stt_benchmark and t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure, aggregator cache, and .gitkeep files.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: stt-benchmark-run task type does not list research-papers as an optional step.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: stt-benchmark-run task type does not list research-internet as an optional step.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0004 keyword vocabulary list, t0001 benchmark dataset loader, and t0006 parallel benchmark code for reuse in Granite inference scripts.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design GPU inference pipeline for two Granite 4.1 2B runs (no-biasing and keyword-biased), estimate compute cost, and specify prediction asset schema.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Provision A100 or H100 GPU instance (6-8 GB VRAM required for Granite 4.1 2B) on Vast.ai or equivalent.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run Granite 4.1 2B batch inference (no-biasing and keyword-biased) on all 93 gold-92 clips, compute all registered metrics with BCa bootstrap CIs, and produce two predictions assets.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Destroy GPU instance after implementation, update machine_log.json and costs.json with final usage.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: stt-benchmark-run task type does not list creative-thinking as an optional step.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, and comparison charts for Granite no-biasing vs. keyword-biased vs. Whisper baseline.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare Granite 4.1 2B metrics against published HuggingFace Open ASR Leaderboard results and prior t0004 Whisper baseline.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate suggestions.json for follow-up tasks based on Granite benchmark findings (e.g., fine-tuning, streaming path, production integration).

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture session transcripts, set task.json status to completed, and finalize the task.
